series_metadata.series_description: The fraud attorney preparation files contain attorney work product used by an attorney representing the Special Investigation Unit (SIU) when the SIU is brought before the Industrial Commission. Attorney work product is any document or material prepared by an attorney, those working for the attorney, in anticipation of a lawsuit or other form of litigation.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: The fraud attorney preparation files are to be kept through the current pending fraud hearing and appeal on the claim in question; then destroy as confidential records. ; Paper: The fraud attorney preparation files are to be kept through the current pending fraud hearing and appeal on the claim in question; then destroy as confidential records., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
